wishes.name: Ahmmd
wishes.message: Happy bday naba and I hope you are having a great day, hope that you are fine and well and hope that your health becomes better, don't forget to enjoy your day and be around people that you love!

wishes.name: Bastaki
wishes.message:
Hi Nadada, As you can see, my time has come to an end, and I'll become expired soon.

I wanted to let you know that you made my days happier just by being there. Your kind heart and your presence have a way of making every room shine brighter. You're amazing simply by being yourself, turning sad days into happy and enjoyable ones.

You'll always have a special place deep in my heart, and I truly wish you nothing but the very best in life happiness, success, and a future free from troubles.

Happy Birthday enjoy your special day and suk toe. :zzmilklove:

wishes.message:
Happiest birthdayyy Nada💗
U can be the cutiest and sweetiest person i've ever seen!!!😻I'm wishing you perfect birthday and shiny,sparkling future<33
May Allah make you as beautiful as star and as free as sky🌸
Till now,i had soo sweet moments with you and i hope we'll continue to have more and more day by day inshallah ya roohi❤️
بحبّك من قلبي يا قلبي، إنتي عينيّا😻😻😻❤️

wishes.name: SJOD
wishes.message: happy birthday nada!! i can no longer call you a kid that makes me rlly sad but its ok i forgive you, hope u have fun and enjoy ur dayyyy

wishes.name: Lefan
wishes.message:
I have no clue about what the future is hiding to anyone, but I will always wish you the best, and thanks for helping me out, sorry if I couldnt be much of a help if you needed help once,
Forgetting the past looking at the future, I wish you a pleasant birthday and a happy new year🩷🦋🌸

wishes.name: souffle
wishes.message:
Happy Birthday!! ₍ᐢ. .ᐢ₎♡

I heard it was your birthday, so I wanted to drop by and say hello! It's been a really long time since we last talked, but I still remember the fun times we had playing together. (˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶)

I hope you've been doing well and that today is filled with lots of happiness, good food, and wonderful memories. ✨

Wishing you a year full of good luck, success, and things that make you smile! ヽ(✿ﾟ▽ﾟ)ノ

Take care, and enjoy your special day! (｡･ω･｡)ﾉ♡

Hope this year brings you success, good health, and plenty of reasons to smile. Enjoy your special day and have an amazing year ahead! Happy Birthday! 🍰🎂🎊🎈🎉🎁 🦶

wishes.name: ItzYman
wishes.message:
Happpyyy birthdayyy Ndooshh!!!

I hope your 19th birthday brings you so much joy, laughter, and unforgettable moments filled with blessings and happiness.
It's so special to have a 6-year friendship with such an extraordinary person like you, and I'm so lucky to call you my sis (still little tho)
From this day on, I hope your life only gets better. May you always be blessed with good health, endless happiness, and be surrounded by people who truly love and appreciate you, because you bring peace, comfort, and laughter wherever you go... maybe a little more sense to your tiny brain
You have one of the kindest hearts I've ever known, and I'm so proud of the person you've become. Never change who you are, because the world truly needs more people like you. I can't wait to see all the amazing things you'll accomplish. I'll always be cheering you on. 🤍

Thank you for being the amazing person you are. Wishing you the happiest birthday and an incredible year ahead.

wishes.name: Basil
wishes.message:
happy birthday nada :heart:

i don't know where to start when writing this message because there's so much i wanna say to you, but let's start with , " i hope you have one of the best birthdays (and the best birthday) , i hope this day is full of things you love, full of mcdonalds, full of stuff you like to eat, full of laughs, and good memories to make with yourself and your loved ones <3

and i wanted to remind you how much we ALL appreciate you and how glad we all are that you're in our life, we've had our ups and downs :face_holding_back_tears: but each time we come back stronger , and i'm really grateful that we're still here, and we're still close, what matters is the fact is how we get through these times

we both have been through a lot and we've had times where things weren't perfect , but i still value every memory we made together, nada!! the random conversations about toe LMAO the laughs the moments that probably seemed small but ended up meaning a lot!!! trust me mos tof the times i don't realize howo big the moment is until i look back at it :face_holding_back_tears:

i'm really thankful for you and everything you've done, even the things you might noe realize, you were there for me through my hardest times ever, and always here to listen to me, and someone i could talk to comfortably, i appreciate you muuuuch more than i say

and trust me no matter what happens i want you to know we'll all always be here for you, if you ever need someone to listen , someone to talk to about toe , or just someone who's there you can always come to any of us (EXCLUSIVELY partot group)

and lastly, i hope this year brings you everything you've been wishing for, hope you get appiness, peaceful days, no more bad bad, if they are bad tell them suck toe hoe, because you deserve to smile and less things that stress you out

thank you for staying and thank you for being patient and thank you for being a part of my life <3
happy birthday nada :heart: i hope you enjoy your day and remember that you're more appreciated than you know

wishes.name: iDhoom
wishes.message: Happy birthday, stay happy always.

wishes.name: vDixon
wishes.message:
Hey Nada, Happy Birthday! 🎉
I hope your day is filled with happiness, laughter, and all the things you love. You truly deserve the best today and always. Wishing you a year ahead full of success, good health, and amazing moments. Enjoy every minute of your special day!

wishes.name: abib52
wishes.message:
As salamu alaikum sister. Happy Birthday! 🎀🎁 I hope you have a great day. To be honest, you are one of the finest people I've ever known - so kind, friendly, funny, and helpful.

In the year and a half since I joined the SixNine guild, you've given me immense support and guidance, and I've learned so much from you. True respect comes from within, and because of the amazing person you are, you have my deepest respect.

May Allah bless you with good health and grant all your wishes. 🤲 Take care.🩷 Best wishes always. <3

wishes.name: Aliyah
wishes.message:
hii nadaaaa (nadar nadoosh ndo ndoh nadoh bada ada nana) 😛

Happiest 19th birthdayyy <3 I hope this year brings you endless joy, happiness, everything that you've been wishing for and more because you deserve a life as beautiful as your heart. 🩷

Honestly, it's so funny whenever I think that we used to hate each other because if someone had told me back then that you'd become one of the most important people in my life I would've laughed, but now I can't imagine my life without you. 🥹

You're more than just my best friend, you're the younger sister I never had. I always see my younger self in you, and that's why I always want to protect you and never see you sad or hurt, guide you and remind you how amazing you are, but you don't need me to remind you because you already know that. Watching you grow up makes me so proud of the way you've progressed through life, and I hope you know that i'll always be cheering and supporting you through every stage of your life 💫

You're one of the funniest and most savage people I know, and you always make me happy even on my worst days with your weird jokes. When I laugh with you, everything feels lighter and I love talking to you about anything and I feel comfortable with you always because you'd never judge me and you're always there for me as I am for you. Thank you for being your crazy, honest, real, caring self and never lose that or change that for anyone because they don't deserve to take that from you. Insha'Allah you'll be blessed with all the best things this year and always, happy birthday once again 🎂

wishes.name: Abdull2h
wishes.message:
happy birthday nada
i really wish you a wonderful birthday and even a happier year hopefully
keep being the amazing n kind person you are, n always remember that you deserve nothing but the very best <3

wishes.name: Tayo
wishes.message:
Happy Birthday, Nada.

I hope you have a good day and a better year ahead,

with things going your way more!
